prose:
The fukui-reactivity task on aniline was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The charge was 0 and the multiplicity was 1.

The most electrophilic site is carbon atom 3 (0-indexed 2) with a fukui_plus value of 2.2975867.
The most nucleophilic site is nitrogen atom 1 (0-indexed 0) with a fukui_minus value of 0.20452359.

The calculation was performed using PySCF and converged successfully. No warnings were reported.
